message:
feat(extensions): add provider streaming, session labels, flags, and
message injection APIs

Major extension system expansion adding provider streaming, session
control, and registration enhancements:

Extension Policy (extensions.rs):
- Add "events" and "session" to default capabilities
- Add RegisterPayload.flags for extension flag declarations
- Add ExtensionSession::set_label() for labeling session entries
- Add JsExtensionSnapshot.flags field
- Add 4 new JsRuntimeCommand variants for provider streaming:
  ProviderStreamSimpleStart, Next, Cancel, SetFlagValue
- Implement corresponding public methods on JsExtensionRuntimeHandle
  including fire-and-forget cancel_best_effort with thread fallback

Extension Dispatcher (extension_dispatcher.rs):
- Add set_label() stubs to test session implementations
- Add tests for session model get/set/reject flows

JS Bridge (extensions_js.rs):
- Add streamSimple detection and validation in __pi_register_provider
- Add AbortController polyfill (__pi_make_abort_controller)
- Add provider streaming functions: start, next, cancel
- Add session helpers: getSessionName, setSessionName, setLabel
- Include flags array in extension snapshot output

New Test Files:
- tests/extensions_registration.rs: Unit tests for command, shortcut,
  flag, and provider registration on ExtensionManager
- tests/extensions_message_session.rs: Unit tests for message injection,
  session control, tool management, model control via RecordingSession
- tests/e2e_extension_registration.rs: E2E test loading real .mjs
  extension through the full JS-to-Rust pipeline
- tests/e2e_message_session_control.rs: E2E test for message injection
  and session control through the full pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
